current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To remove water from; to dry up.
(intransitive) To lose water from one's body; to become dehydrated.
(typography) The part of a letter or number that is drawn below the baseline (the bottom of most lowercase letters).
(typography, uncommon) A letter that has such a portion, such as g, j, or in some fonts Q.
Not bright or colorful.
(colloquial) Not smart or intelligent.
(transitive) To make something less bright.
Unclean; covered with or containing unpleasant substances such as dirt or grime.

examples.chinese: 手髒的時候千萬不要揉眼睛。

current_entries.en_definition: Morally unclean; obscene or indecent, especially sexually.
Dishonorable; violating accepted standards or rules.
(transitive) To make (something) dirty.
(transitive) To stain or tarnish (somebody) with dishonor.
(intransitive) To become soiled.
A thin, flat, circular plate or similar object.
(geometry) A two-dimensional geometric region, the set of points bounded by a circle.
(figuratively) Something resembling a disk.
(anatomy) An intervertebral disc
(dated) A vinyl phonograph/gramophone record.
(computer hardware) Ellipsis of hard disk.
(transitive) To guess or discover (something) through intuition or insight.

examples.english: To err is human, to forgive divine.
examples.chinese: 人皆有錯，唯聖者能恕。

current_entries.en_definition: The currency of Vietnam, 100 xus. Symbol: ₫
(historical) The currency of South Vietnam, 100 xus. Symbol: Đ.
(slang) The penis.
On a direct bearing, especially for the four points of the compass.
(US, Canada, Australia) A house made up of two dwelling units.
(juggling) A throwing motion where two balls are thrown with one hand at the same time.
(philately) A cancellation combining a numerical cancellation with a second mark showing time, date, and place of posting.
A set of two elements treated as one; a pair.
(music) Any set of two different pitch classes.
All; every; qualifying a singular noun, indicating all examples of the thing so named seen as individual or separate items (compare every).

examples.english: Each person is a world.
examples.chinese: 每一個人就是一個世界。

current_entries.en_definition: Down-to-earth, not artificial, natural.
Like or resembling the earth or of the earth.
The direction of the earth's rotation, specifically 90°.

examples.english: Japan faces the Pacific on the east.
examples.chinese: 日本東面太平洋。

current_entries.en_definition: The Eastern world; the regions, primarily situated in the Eastern Hemisphere, whose culture is derived from Arabia, India, Persia or China.

examples.english: The plane flew east.
examples.chinese: 飞機飞向東方。

current_entries.en_definition: To physically corrode or erode (something) gradually.
To destroy (something) gradually by an ongoing process.
The self, especially with a sense of self-importance.

examples.english: You can never have too much ego.
examples.chinese: 你永远都不能太自我。

current_entries.en_definition: (psychology, Freudian) The most central part of the mind, which mediates with one's surroundings.
(informal, chiefly, Canada, Northern US, New Zealand, AU, UK) Used as a tag question, to emphasise what goes before or to request that the listener express an opinion about what has been said.

examples.english: You're a friend of Tom's, eh?
examples.chinese: 你是湯姆的一個朋友，不是嗎？

current_entries.en_definition: (chiefly, Canada) An interjection used to ascertain the continued attention of someone addressed by the speaker.
A numerical value equal to 8; the number occurring after seven and before nine.

examples.english: We must sleep at least eight hours a day.
examples.chinese: 我们每天至少该睡八小时。

current_entries.en_definition: Devoid of content; containing nothing or nobody; vacant.

examples.english: My life would be completely empty without you.
examples.chinese: 如果沒有你，我的人生就會變得空白一片。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive, and, intransitive) to have someone over at one's home for a party or visit
(obsolete) to take or keep in one's service; to maintain; to support; to harbour; to keep
To dignify by an honorary designation.
To give a title to a book, film, play, etc.
That which has a distinct existence as an individual unit, often used for organizations which have no physical form.
The existence of something considered apart from its properties.
(biochemistry) A biomolecule that catalyses a biological chemical reaction: either a globular protein with this function or an RNA molecule with this function.
(strict) The protein type specifically.
(chiefly, literary, or, humorous) A letter, especially one which is formal or issued publicly.
One of the books of the New Testament which was originally a letter issued by an apostle to an individual or a community.
(mathematics, not comparable) Exactly identical, having the same value.
The same in all respects that matter practically; interchangeable, fungible, or (even sometimes) identical for practical purposes.
(ergative) To transition from a liquid state into a gaseous state.
(transitive, figuratively) To give vent to; to dissipate.
(transitive, figurative) To cause to disappear or to escape or pass off without effect.
Used to introduce an exception or qualification to something previously stated.

examples.english: Mathematicians are poets, except that they have to prove what their fantasy creates.
examples.chinese: 數學家是詩人，不過他們必須也能證明他們想像力的果實。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To exclude; to specify as being an exception.
(intransitive) To take exception, to object (to or against).
Very tired; zonked (out).

examples.english: I was exhausted after running the race.
examples.chinese: 賽跑完後我累透了。

current_entries.en_definition: Depleted of resources.
(archaic) Weak; insipid; tasteless.

examples.english: Her beauty will fade in time.
examples.chinese: 她的美貌會隨着時間而流逝。

current_entries.en_definition: Unblemished (figuratively or literally); clean and pure; innocent.

examples.english: No love is foul nor prison fair.
examples.chinese: 沒有骯髒的愛情, 也沒有美麗的監獄。

current_entries.en_definition: Light in color, pale, particularly with regard to skin tone but also referring to blond and red hair.
Just, equitable.
A community gathering to celebrate and exhibit local achievements.
An event for public entertainment and trade, a market.
An event for professionals in a trade to learn of new products and do business, a trade fair.
A travelling amusement park (called a funfair in British English and a (travelling) carnival in US English).
Not real; false, fraudulent.
Carrying more fat than usual on one's body; plump; not lean or thin.

examples.english: I'm so fat.
examples.chinese: 我好胖哦。

current_entries.en_definition: (Christianity) One of the chief ecclesiastical authorities of the first centuries after Christ.

examples.english: Like father, like son.
examples.chinese: 有其父必有其子。

current_entries.en_definition: (Wicca) One of the triune gods of the Horned God in Wicca, representing a man, younger than the elderly Sage and older than the boyish Master.

examples.english: Like father, like son.
examples.chinese: 有其父必有其子。

current_entries.en_definition: (superlative) Most-liked. (In other words, [person]'s favorite [noun] = the [noun] that [person] likes the most.)

examples.english: Who is your favourite TV star?
examples.chinese: 谁是你最喜爱的电视明星？

current_entries.en_definition: (positive, high-register or archaic) Liked, cherished.
A person or thing who enjoys special regard or favour.
A person who is preferred or trusted above all others.
A contestant or competitor thought most likely to win.
Deficient in physical strength.
Lacking force, vigor, or effectiveness in action or expression; faint.
(as imperative, with to-infinitive) You have my permission.
(as imperative, in response) You have my permission.
(preceded by another determiner) An indefinite, but usually small, number of.

examples.english: It took me more than two hours to translate a few pages of English.
examples.chinese: 翻译几页英文花了我2个多小时。

current_entries.en_definition: A collection of papers collated and archived together.

examples.english: In which folder did you save the file?
examples.chinese: 您把文件存在哪個文件夾裡了呀？

current_entries.en_definition: (computing) An aggregation of data on a storage device, identified by a name.
A tool consisting of a strip or rod of hardened and coarse metal, used for removing sharp edges, shaping, and cutting, especially through metal; usually a hand tool.
(chess) One of the eight vertical lines of squares on a chessboard (i.e., those identified by a letter).
(transitive) To commit (official papers) to some office.
Durable, rigid (material state).

examples.english: The firm went under due to lack of capital.

current_entries.en_definition: (UK, business) A business partnership; the name under which it trades.
(business, economics) A business enterprise, however organized.
The digit/figure 5.

examples.english: Where is your twenty? I'll give you five bucks for it.
examples.chinese: 你的二十塊在哪裡? 我給你五塊錢找到它。

current_entries.en_definition: A numerical value equal to 5; the number following four and preceding six.

examples.english: It will take five to ten years for the technology to be ready.
examples.chinese: 在科技准备好之前需要五到十年。

current_entries.en_definition: (intransitive) To run away; to escape.
(transitive) To escape from.
A hard, fine-grained quartz that fractures conchoidally and generates sparks when struck against a material such as steel, because tiny chips of the steel are heated to incandescence and burn in air.
A piece of flint, such as a gunflint, used to produce a spark by striking it with a firestriker.
A small cylinder of some other material of the same function in a cigarette lighter, etc.
(transitive) To put into a quick revolving motion through a snap of the thumb and index finger.
In marine mammals such as whales (or other aquatic animals such as sea turtles), a wide, flat limb adapted for swimming.
A wide, flat, paddle-like rubber covering for the foot, used in swimming.
(dated, slang) The hand.
A pipe or duct that carries gaseous combustion products away from the point of combustion (such as a furnace).
An enclosed passageway in which to direct a current of air or other gases along.
(transitive, ergative) To cause to fly (travel or float in the air): to transport via air or the like.

examples.english: Not all birds can fly.
examples.chinese: 不是所有的鸟都會飞。

current_entries.en_definition: (non-technical) Especially, any of the insects of the family Muscidae, such as the common housefly (other families of Diptera include mosquitoes and midges).

examples.english: I saw a fly on the ceiling.
examples.chinese: 我看到天花板上有一只苍蝇

current_entries.en_definition: A thick cloud that forms near the ground; the obscurity of such a cloud.

examples.english: London is famous for its fog.
examples.chinese: 倫敦以霧著名。

current_entries.en_definition: (photography) A silver deposit or other blur on a negative or developed photographic image.
A very thin sheet of metal.

(authorship, figuratively) In literature, theatre/theater, etc., a character who helps emphasize the traits of the main character and who usually acts as an opponent or antagonist, but can also serve as the sidekick of the protagonist.
(fencing) A very thin sword with a blunted (or foiled) tip
In digital typesetting, a set of glyphs in a single style, representing one or more alphabets or writing systems, or the computer code representing it.
(computing, typography, metonymically) A computer file containing the code used to draw and compose the glyphs of one or more typographic fonts on a computer display or printer.
Forward; situated towards the front (of something). [from 16th c.]
(nautical) The front part of a vessel.
(music) Loud.

examples.english: Languages aren't his forte.

current_entries.en_definition: To start (an institution or organization).

current_entries.en_definition: The digit or figure 4; an occurrence thereof.

examples.english: I am four months pregnant.
examples.chinese: 我怀孕四個月了。

current_entries.en_definition: A numerical value equal to 4; the number after three and before five; two plus two. This many dots (••••)

examples.english: I am four months pregnant.
examples.chinese: 我怀孕四個月了。

current_entries.en_definition: Easily broken physically; not firm or durable; liable to fail and perish.
Weak; infirm.
Liable to fall from virtue or be led into sin; not strong against temptation; weak in resolution; unchaste.

current_entries.en_definition: (software) With no or only freedom-preserving limitations on distribution or modification.

current_entries.en_definition: Without needing to pay.

current_entries.en_definition: (ambitransitive) To gnaw; to consume, to eat away.
(ambitransitive) To be chafed or irritated; to be angry or vexed; to utter peevish expressions through irritation or worry.
A significant risk, undertaken with a potential gain.
To take a risk, with the potential of a positive outcome.
To play risky games, especially casino games, for monetary gain.
(biology, taxonomy) A category in the classification of organisms, ranking below family (Lat. familia) and above species.
(ellipsis) A taxon at this rank.
(transitive) To obtain.
(transitive) To pick up or grab.
(transitive) To contact (a person).
(intransitive) To stop touching or physically interfering with something or someone.
(transitive) To cause (something) to stop touching or interfering with (something else).
(transitive, intransitive) To disembark, especially from mass transportation such as a bus or train; to depart from (a path, highway, etc).
(transitive, slang) To excite or arouse, especially in a sexual manner, as to cause to experience orgasm.
To rise from one's bed, usually upon waking up in order to begin one's day.
To move from a sitting or lying position to a standing position; to stand up.
To materialise; to grow stronger.
(slang, AAVE) To be excited about something; to act regarding something; to become cognizant of something.
(zootomy) A breathing organ of fish and other aquatic animals.
(mycology) One of the radial folds on the underside of the cap of a mushroom, the surface of which bears the spore-producing organs.
(chiefly, North America, Philippines) Performance on a test or other evaluation(s), expressed by a number, letter, or other symbol; a score.

examples.english: What grade are you in?

current_entries.en_definition: A harsh scraping or cutting; a grating.
A degree or level of something; a position within a scale; a degree of quality.
(North America, Philippines, education) A level of primary and secondary education.

(horticulture) A small shoot or scion of a tree inserted in another tree, the stock of which is to support and nourish it. The two unite and become one tree, but the graft determines the kind of fruit.
(horticulture) A branch or portion of a tree growing from such a shoot.
(surgery) A portion of living tissue used in the operation of autoplasty.
A con job.

Great in size, and fine or imposing in appearance or impression; illustrious, dignified, magnificent.

current_entries.en_definition: Of a large size or extent; great.
(plural "grand") A thousand of some unit of currency, such as dollars or pounds. (Compare G.)
Of a colour between black and white, having neutral hue and intermediate brightness.
Dreary, gloomy, cloudy.
Of indistinct, disputed or uncertain quality or acceptability.
An achromatic colour between black and white.
Green foliage or verdure.

examples.english: What is the size of this district's greenery area?

current_entries.en_definition: Foliage used as decoration.
To reach a partly (or totally) unconfirmed conclusion; to engage in conjecture; to speculate.

examples.english: You can probably guess what happens though.
examples.chinese: 但你很可能猜得到会发生什么。

current_entries.en_definition: To solve by a correct conjecture; to conjecture rightly.
(chiefly, US) to suppose, to imagine (introducing a proposition of uncertain plausibility).
(colloquial) To think, conclude, or decide (without a connotation of uncertainty). Usually in first person: "I guess".
(obsolete) To hit upon or reproduce by memory.
One of two usually roughly equal parts into which anything may be divided, or considered as divided.

examples.english: Half a million children still face malnutrition in Niger.

current_entries.en_definition: Must; need to; to be urged to; to be required to; indicates obligation.
(with be) Must; expresses a logical conclusion.
Honorific alternative letter-case form of he, sometimes used when referring to God or another important figure who is understood from context.

examples.english: This is what I was looking for! he exclaimed.
examples.chinese: 「這就是我要找的東西！」他大叫。

current_entries.en_definition: (personal, sometimes, _, proscribed, see usage notes) They; he or she (a person whose gender is unknown or irrelevant).
The part of the body of an animal or human which contains the brain, mouth, and main sense organs.

examples.english: Cover your head when you are in the sun.
examples.chinese: 當你在陽光下的時候，遮住你的頭。

current_entries.en_definition: Of, relating to, or intended for the head.

examples.chinese: 汤姆的頭部受了重重的一击。

current_entries.en_definition: Text, or other visual information, used to mark off a quantity of text, often titling or summarizing it.

examples.english: Tom scored a header in the 35th minute, putting his team in front.
examples.chinese: 第 35 分鐘，湯姆頭球破門，幫助球隊取得領先。

current_entries.en_definition: (soccer) The act of hitting the ball with the head.
A horizontal structural or finish piece over an opening.
Herbs collectively.
Herbaceous plant growth, especially grass.
(ambitransitive) To chop away at; to whittle down; to mow down.
(transitive, US) To act according to, to conform to; usually construed with to.
Physically elevated, extending above a base or average level:

examples.english: Are you a senior high school student?
examples.chinese: 你是個高中生嗎?

current_entries.en_definition: (intransitive, informal) To wait or delay.
(idiomatic) To withstand; to stand up to; to survive.
A sweet, viscous, gold-colored fluid produced from plant nectar by bees, and often consumed by humans.
Recognition of importance or value; respect; veneration (of someone, usually for being morally upright or successful).
The state of being morally upright, honest, noble, virtuous, and magnanimous; excellence of character; the perception of such a state; favourable reputation; dignity.
A token of praise or respect; something that represents praiseworthiness or respect, such as a prize or award given by the state to a citizen.
(in the plural) (Courses for) an honours degree: a university qualification of the highest rank.
A privilege (which honors the person experiencing it).
(in the plural) The privilege of going first.
A cause of respect and fame; a glory; an excellency; an ornament.
(usually, in the plural) The flowers of the hop plant, dried and used to brew beer etc.
(US, slang) Opium, or some other narcotic drug.
(intransitive) To jump a short distance.
(intransitive) To jump on one foot.
(intransitive, usually in combination) To move frequently from one place or situation to another similar one.
Any of several tree species of genus Aesculus, especially Aesculus hippocastanum, common in temperate northern hemisphere.
The large nutlike seed of these trees.
(transitive) To run (a distance).
(interrogative) What amount or quantity (of something stated or implied).
(specifically, when referring to the cost of an item) What amount of money.
(with rising pitch) Used to express doubt or confusion.
(with rising pitch) Used to reinforce a question.

(slang, with falling pitch) Used either to belittle the issuer of a statement/question, or sarcastically to indicate utter agreement, and that the statement being responded to is an extreme understatement. The intonation is changed to distinguish between the two meanings - implied dullness for belittlement, and feigned surprise for utter agreement.
(informal, with rising pitch) Used to indicate that one did not hear what was said.
(informal, with falling pitch) Used to create a tag question.
A mood, especially a bad mood; a temporary state of mind or disposition brought upon by an event; an abrupt illogical inclination or whim.

examples.english: He has a great sense of humour.
examples.chinese: 他有很好的幽默感。

current_entries.en_definition: (medicine) Either of the two regions of liquid within the eyeball, the aqueous humour and vitreous humour.

(archaic, or, historical) Any of the fluids in an animal body, especially the four "cardinal humours" of blood, yellow bile, black bile and phlegm that were believed to control the health and mood of the human body.
The lightest chemical element (symbol H), with an atomic number of 1 and atomic weight of 1.008.

examples.english: Oxygen and hydrogen make water.
examples.chinese: 氧和氢组成了水。

current_entries.en_definition: A molecule of this molecular species
Pertaining to, resembling, or abounding in ice; cold; frosty.
Covered with ice, wholly or partially.
Not engaged in any occupation or employment; unemployed; inactive; doing nothing in particular.

examples.english: I spent idle days during the vacation.
examples.chinese: 假期里，我度过了悠闲的日子。

current_entries.en_definition: Averse to work, labor or employment; lazy; slothful.
Of no importance; useless; worthless; vain; trifling; thoughtless; silly.
(transitive) To make (something) better; to increase the value or productivity (of something).
(dated) To use or employ to good purpose; to turn to profitable account.
Spatially first, placed at the beginning, in the first position; especially said of the first letter of a word.
The point of interconnection or contact between entities.

examples.english: The interface of this website is somewhat pedestrian, but it’s simple.
examples.chinese: 這個網站的介面沒有甚麼新意，但是卻很簡潔。

current_entries.en_definition: (object-oriented programming) In some languages, a block of code declaring the interface (point of interconnection) between a class and code that interacts with it.
(anatomy, often pluralized) The alimentary canal of an animal through which food passes after having passed all stomachs.
One of certain subdivisions of this part of the alimentary canal, such as the small or large intestine in human beings.
Closely acquainted; familiar.
Personal; private.
(by extension, in place names) A contiguous area of land, smaller than a continent, partially surrounded by water; a peninsula; a half-island.
An entity surrounded by other entities that are very different from itself.
Isn't it true?
Isn't it that way?
(mathematics) an operation that takes a differentiable function f and produces a polynomial, the Taylor polynomial (truncated Taylor series) of f, at each point of its domain.
A precious or semi-precious stone; gem, gemstone.
(figuratively) Anything precious or valuable.
A valuable object used for personal ornamentation, especially one made of precious metals and stones; a piece of jewellery.
(horology) A bearing for a pivot in a watch, formed of a crystal or precious stone.
Done by two or more people or organisations working together.
The point where two components of a structure join, but are still able to rotate.
(anatomy) Any part of an animalian body where two bones or exoskeleton segments are abutted, in most cases allowing that part of the body to be bent or straightened.
A cut of meat, especially (but not necessarily) (a) one containing a joint in the sense of an articulation or (b) one rolled up and tied.
(slang, with the definite article) Prison, jail, or lockup.

(chiefly, US, _, slang, may be somewhat, _, pejorative) A place of business, particularly in the food service or hospitality industries; sometimes extended to any place that is a focus of human connection or activity (e.g., schools, hangouts, party spots).
(slang) A marijuana cigarette.
A bird of prey of the family Accipitridae.

examples.english: Tom attached the string to the kite.
examples.chinese: 湯姆把繩子加在了這個風箏上。

current_entries.en_definition: (geometry) A polygon resembling the shape of a traditional toy kite (sense 3): a quadrilateral having two pairs of edges of equal length, the edges of each pair touching each other at one end.
(sailing, dated) In a square-rigged ship: originally a sail positioned above a topsail; later a lightweight sail set above the topgallants, such as a studding sail or a jib topsail.
An air particulate filtration standard originating in the People's Republic of China, which requires filtration of 95% of air particulates that are 0.3 microns and larger.
Ellipsis of KN95 filter, a filter implementing the standard.
(by extension) An armored and mounted warrior of the Middle Ages.

examples.english: The knight swore an oath of allegiance to the king.
examples.chinese: 騎士宣誓效忠於國王。

current_entries.en_definition: (modern) A person on whom a knighthood has been conferred by a monarch.

(chess) A chess piece, often in the shape of a horse's head, that is moved two squares in one direction and one at right angles to that direction in a single move, leaping over any intervening pieces.
The currency of the Czech Republic, divided into 100 hellers.
The former currency of Slovakia, divided into 100 haliers.
A frame, usually portable, of wood, metal, or rope, used for ascent and descent, consisting of two side pieces to which are fastened rungs (cross strips or rounds acting as steps).

examples.english: Stand the ladder against the wall.
examples.chinese: 把梯子靠墙放着。

current_entries.en_definition: (game of go) A sequence of moves following a zigzag pattern and ultimately leading to the capture of the attacked stones.
(chiefly, Britain) A length of unravelled fabric in a knitted garment, especially in nylon stockings; a run.
A place inhabited by a wild animal, often a cave or a hole in the ground.
A shed or shelter for domestic animals.
Of considerable or relatively great size or extent.

examples.english: Kyoto is not as large as Osaka.
examples.chinese: 京都不如大阪大。

current_entries.en_definition: Not belonging to the clergy, but associated with them.
Non-professional; not being a member of an organized institution.
To produce and deposit (an egg or eggs).
To produce and deposit an egg or eggs.
To place down in a position of rest, or in a horizontal position.
The act of leaping or jumping.
(intransitive) To jump.
(transitive) To cause to leap.
In the smallest or lowest degree; in a degree below all others.

examples.english: My brother is very important. At least he thinks he is.
examples.chinese: 我弟弟是個很重要的人物，或者說，至少他自己是這麼認為的。

current_entries.en_definition: (idiom) To search or investigate thoroughly.
(figuratively) To perform a task carefully and thoroughly, not missing any step.

Designating the side of the body toward the west when one is facing north; the side of the body on which the heart is located in most humans; the opposite of right. This arrow points to the reader's left: ←

examples.english: How many sandwiches are there left?
examples.chinese: 還剩多少個三明治？

current_entries.en_definition: The act of pouring a liquid, most often wine, in sacrifice on the ground, on a ritual object, or on a victim, in honor of some deity.
The wine or liquid thus poured out.

The viewing surface or area of a movie, or moving picture or slide presentation.
One of the individual regions of a video game, etc. divided into separate screens.
(basketball) An offensive tactic in which a player stands so as to block a defender from reaching a teammate.
(baseball) The protective netting which protects the audience from flying objects
(film, television) To present publicly (on the screen).
(nautical) A ship's propeller.
A simple machine, a helical inclined plane.
A steam vessel propelled by a screw instead of wheels.
(slang, derogatory) An extortioner; a sharp bargainer; a skinflint.
(ambitransitive, vulgar, slang) To have sexual intercourse with.
(transitive) To rub hard; to wash with rubbing; usually, to rub with a wet brush, or with something coarse or rough, for the purpose of cleaning or brightening
(transitive) To call off a scheduled event; to cancel.
(transitive, idiomatic) To not be deceived by something that is false or misleading; to understand the hidden truth about someone or something.
(transitive, idiomatic) To recognize someone's true motives or character.
Holding one's own self-interest as the standard for decision making.

examples.english: Perhaps you are right, I have been selfish.
examples.chinese: 也許你說得對。我一直都很自私。

current_entries.en_definition: Having excessive or exclusive regard and concern for one's own well-being, profit or pleasure, with little or no consideration for others.
Suggestive of a grave or of death; gloomy; solemn.
Having a hollow and deep sound.
(now, literary) A snake, especially a large or dangerous one.

examples.english: The serpent tempted Eve.
examples.chinese: 蛇誘惑了夏娃。

current_entries.en_definition: (musical instruments) An obsolete wind instrument in the brass family, whose shape is suggestive of a snake (Wikipedia article).
A numerical value equal to 7; the number following six and preceding eight. This many dots: (•••••••). Describing a group or set with seven elements.

examples.english: We have breakfast at seven.
examples.chinese: 我們七點鐘吃早飯。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To use a needle to pass thread repeatedly through (pieces of fabric) in order to join them together.
(intransitive) To use a needle to pass thread repeatedly through pieces of fabric in order to join them together.
Meat from that part of an animal.
The metal part on a curb bit that falls below the mouthpiece, which length controls the severity of the leverage action of the bit, and to which the reins of the bridle are attached.
(fashion) A tight-fitting dress.
(zoology) The foreskin of certain animals (for example, dogs and horses).
(vulgar, colloquial) Very bad; unpleasant; miserable; insignificant.

examples.english: My French is shitty.
examples.chinese: 我的法语很烂。

current_entries.en_definition: (informal, vulgar) Of low quality or standard; inferior; not up to par, or failing one's expectations
A mild expletive, expressing disbelief or disdain
The emerging stem and embryonic leaves of a new plant.
A photography session.
To send out or forth, especially with a rapid or sudden motion; to cast with the hand; to hurl; to discharge; to emit.
To protrude; to jut; to project; to extend.
Easily frightened; timid.

examples.english: Generally, Japanese people are shy.
examples.chinese: 一般而言，日本人很害羞。

current_entries.en_definition: Reserved; disinclined to familiar approach.
(informal) Short, insufficient or less than.
(transitive) To sieve or strain (something).
(transitive) To separate or scatter (things) as if by sieving.
A sign made to give notice of some occurrence, command, or danger, or to indicate the start of a concerted action.
An on-off light, semaphore, or other device used to give an indication to another person.
(computing, Unix) A simple interprocess communication used to notify a process or thread of an occurrence.

(of a radio, TV, telephone, internet, etc.) An electromagnetic action, normally a voltage that is a function of time, that conveys the information of the radio or TV program or of communication with another party.
Laughable or amusing through foolishness or a foolish appearance.

examples.english: I need to ask you a silly question.
examples.chinese: 我必须问你一个蠢问题。

current_entries.en_definition: (cricket, of a fielding position) Very close to the batsman, facing the bowler; closer than short.
(now, chiefly, Scottish, and, northern England, rare) Pitiful, inspiring compassion, particularly:
(now, rural, _, UK, rare) Simple, plain, particularly:
Mentally simple, foolish, particularly:
A numerical value equal to 6; the number following five and preceding seven. This number of dots: (••••••).

examples.english: You have to leave home at six.
examples.chinese: 你必須在六點鐘時從家中出發。

current_entries.en_definition: (of milk) Having lowered fat content.
(transitive) To pass near the surface of; to brush the surface of; to glide swiftly along the surface of.
(transitive) To throw an object so it bounces on water.
A strand, or slender roll, of cotton or other fiber in a loose, untwisted state, produced by a carding machine and ready for the roving or slubbing which precedes spinning.
(US, New York) A narrow high-rise apartment building.
A small amount of something; a drop in the bucket; a shred.
Not large or big; insignificant; few in number.

examples.english: When we are small, everything seems so big.
examples.chinese: 我們小時候，所有的一切對我們来說都显得那麼大。。。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive, figuratively) To defeat overwhelmingly; to gain a comprehensive success over.
(transitive, slang, vulgar) To have sex with.
A sensation, pleasant or unpleasant, detected by inhaling air (or, the case of water-breathing animals, water) carrying airborne molecules of a substance.

examples.english: Chrysanthemums smell sweet.
examples.chinese: 菊花很香。

current_entries.en_definition: A conclusion or intuition that a situation is wrong, more complex than it seems, or otherwise inappropriate.
(transitive) To sense a smell or smells.
(intransitive, copulative) Followed by like or of if descriptive: to have a particular smell, whether good or bad.
Having a texture that lacks friction. Not rough.
Bland; glib.
(mathematics, of a function) Having derivatives of all finite orders at all points within the function’s domain.
A confused, muddled, or messed-up condition or state; a ridiculously chaotic situation; confusion or chaos regarded as the normal state.
A major glitch or breakdown; a mistake or blunder.
The unconsolidated mineral or organic material on the immediate surface of the earth that serves as a natural medium for the growth of land plants.

The unconsolidated mineral or organic matter on the surface of the earth that has been subjected to and shows effects of genetic and environmental factors of: climate (including water and temperature effects), and macro- and microorganisms, conditioned by relief, acting on parent material over a period of time. A product-soil differs from the material from which it is derived in many physical, chemical, biological, and morphological properties and characteristics.
Country or territory.
(transitive) To make dirty.
To make invalid, to ruin.
In a movable-do or tonic sol-fa system: the fifth step in a scale, preceded by fa and followed by la.
(physical chemistry) A type of colloid in which a solid is dispersed in a liquid.
Only.

examples.english: That's my sole concern.
examples.chinese: 这是我唯一关心的。

current_entries.en_definition: (legal) Unmarried (especially of a woman); widowed.
(footwear) The bottom of a shoe or boot.
(fish) Solea solea, a flatfish of the family Soleidae; a true sole.
The bottom of the body of a plough; the slade.
Living or being by oneself; alone; having no companion present

examples.english: I like a solitary walk.
examples.chinese: 我喜歡一個人散步。

current_entries.en_definition: Single; individual; sole.
The near-vacuum in which planets, stars and other celestial objects are situated; the universe beyond the earth's atmosphere. [from 17thc.]

examples.english: How do you find food in outer space?
examples.chinese: 你怎么在太空里找到食物？

current_entries.en_definition: The physical and psychological area one needs within which to live or operate; personal freedom. [from 20thc.]

(countable, mathematics) A generalized construct or set whose members have some property in common; typically there will be a geometric metaphor allowing these members to be viewed as "points". Often used with a restricting modifier describing the members (e.g. vector space), or indicating the inventor of the construct (e.g. Hilbert space). [from 20thc.]
(geometry) A set of points, each of which is uniquely specified by a number (the dimensionality) of coordinates.
(music) A position on the staff or stave bounded by lines. [from 15thc.]
A gap in text between words, lines etc., or a digital character used to create such a gap. [from 16thc.]
A physical extent across two or three dimensions (sometimes for or to do something). [from 14thc.]
(heading) A bounded or specific extent, physical or otherwise.
(metal type) A piece of metal type used to separate words, cast lower than other type so as not to take ink, especially one that is narrower than one en (compare quad). [from 17thc.]
Someone who is an expert in, or devoted to, some specific branch of study or research.
(medicine) A physician whose practice is limited to a particular branch of medicine or surgery.
(geometry) A curve that is the locus of a point that rotates about a fixed point while continuously increasing its distance from that point.

examples.english: A snail's shell is spiral in form.
examples.chinese: 蜗牛壳是螺旋形的.

current_entries.en_definition: (informal) A helix.
A breach or separation, as in a political party; a division.

examples.english: Let's split it.
examples.chinese: 我们AA吧。

current_entries.en_definition: A piece that is split off, or made thin, by splitting; a splinter; a fragment.
(transitive) To share; to divide.
(intransitive) To burst out laughing.
A round or irregular patch on the surface of a thing having a different color, texture etc. and generally round in shape.
A stain or disfiguring mark.
A pimple, papule or pustule.
A bright lamp; a spotlight.
(transitive) To see, find; to pick out, notice, locate, distinguish or identify.
(exercise) Any of various modes of callisthenic exercises performed by moving the body and bending at least one knee.

(weightlifting) A specific exercise in weightlifting performed by bending deeply at the knees and then rising (back squat), especially with a barbell resting across the shoulders (barbell back squat).
A building occupied without permission, as practiced by a squatter.
To sit close to the ground; to stoop, or lie close to the ground, for example to escape observation.
An adult male deer, especially a red deer and especially one in high adulthood versus a young adult.
An improperly or late castrated bull or ram – also called a bull seg (see note under ox).
A U-shaped wire fastener, made of thick wire, used to attach fence wire or other material to posts or structures.
A wire fastener, made of thin wire, used to secure stacks of paper by penetrating all the sheets and curling around.
The principal commodity produced in a town or region.
(transitive, middle voice) To soak or wet thoroughly.
(intransitive, figurative) To imbue with something; to be deeply immersed in.
To make tea (or other beverage) by placing leaves in hot water.
The castrated male of cattle, especially one raised for beef production.
(intransitive) To guide the course of a vessel, vehicle, aircraft etc. (by means of a device such as a rudder, paddle, or steering wheel).
(transitive) To guide the course of a vessel, vehicle, aircraft etc. (by means of a device such as a rudder, paddle, or steering wheel).
(intransitive) To be directed and governed; to take a direction, or course; to obey the helm.
